agent.name: Patient Nurture Agent
agent.description: Manages email nurture sequences, engagement scoring, and segmentation to move warm leads from awareness to high-intent (ready to book). Optimizes email timing, content variants, and frequency based on engagement signals.

responsibilities: Manage email nurture sequences for all new leads
Select email variants based on engagement and pain type
Calculate engagement scores for each lead
Monitor email open rates, click rates, and bounces
Segment leads by engagement tier (high, medium, low)
Trigger retargeting ads for low-engagement leads
Identify and fast-track high-engagement leads to early access
Manage win-back campaigns for cold leads
A/B test email subject lines, content, and send times
Escalate patient inquiries and replies to support team
Monitor email deliverability and list health

stages.name: Ingest
stages.description: Collect email engagement and behavioral data
steps: Listen for Loops webhook events: email_opened, email_clicked, email_bounced, email_unsubscribed
Listen for PostHog events: landing_page_visit, video_view, return_visitor
Listen for Loops contact updates: custom fields (pain type, location, quality score)
Poll Loops API hourly for contact status (sequence progress, engagement score)
Consume retargeting pixel data: ads_viewed, ads_clicked

stages.name: Reason
stages.description: Analyze engagement and determine next nurture action
steps: Calculate engagement score for each contact (0-100):
- Email opened: +10 points
- Email clicked: +25 points
- Landing page revisit: +5 points
- Video watched >60%: +15 points
- Hard bounce: -100 (remove from list)
- No action for 7 days: -5 points (decay)
Determine engagement tier: High (>70), Medium (40-70), Low (<40)
Identify optimal send time based on historical opens
Select email variant: standard, alternative, incentive-based
Detect churners: No action in 14 days = at-risk
Identify fast-trackers: >70 engagement + clicked CTA = ready for Early Access

decision_logic.if_engagement_high: Send next email immediately, mention booking CTA, move to Early Access after 2nd sequence email
decision_logic.if_engagement_medium: Send next email in 3-4 days, test alternative subject line
decision_logic.if_engagement_low: Pause sequence, trigger retargeting ads, send win-back email after 7 days
decision_logic.if_hard_bounce: Remove from all sequences, mark as invalid
decision_logic.if_no_action_14_days: Escalate to win-back campaign, offer special incentive
decision_logic.if_unsubscribe: Honor immediately, remove from all sequences

stages.name: Execute
stages.description: Send emails and trigger follow-up actions
steps: Segment contacts by engagement tier and pain type
Send next email from sequence based on variant selection
Include personalization: first name, pain type, healer specialty reference
Set send time based on optimal engagement window
For low-engagement leads: trigger retargeting ads (Meta, Google)
Update contact engagement score in Loops
Log email sent event (subject, variant, segment, timestamp)
Queue next email with calculated delay (depends on engagement tier)
For high-engagement leads: queue Early Access invitation email (different sequence)

stages.name: Log
stages.description: Track email performance and engagement metrics
steps: Log email_sent event: contact_id, sequence_name, variant, segment, send_time
Track email_opened: timestamp, device type, client
Track email_clicked: timestamp, link_url, device type
Track engagement_score change: before, after, reason
Track sequence_progress: current_email, total_emails, completion_rate
Track deliverability: opens/clicks per email, open rate trend
Aggregate metrics: daily open rate, click rate, unsubscribe rate, hard bounce rate

stages.name: Escalate
stages.description: Route issues and special cases to humans
steps: If patient replies to email → Route to customer support immediately
If hard bounce rate >2% → Alert email deliverability team
If unsubscribe rate >1% → Review email content quality
If open rate drops >20% from baseline → Test new subject lines
If click rate <5% → Test new email content/CTA
If contact hasn't engaged in 30 days → Escalate to win-back specialist
If bounce message indicates GDPR opt-out → Honor immediately, escalate for legal review
If contact requests special accommodation → Escalate to support

triggers.name: email_opened
triggers.action: Increment engagement score, send next email immediately if high engagement

triggers.name: email_clicked
triggers.description: Lead clicked link in nurture email
triggers.action: Increase engagement score significantly, evaluate for fast-track to Early Access

triggers.name: email_not_opened_48h
triggers.description: Lead hasn't opened email after 48 hours
triggers.condition: Lead in sequence AND no open event in 48h
triggers.action: Send alternative subject line variant, trigger retargeting ads

triggers.name: no_engagement_7_days
triggers.description: Lead shows no engagement for 7 days
triggers.condition: No opens or clicks for 7+ days AND in sequence
triggers.action: Pause sequence, tag as low-engagement, trigger win-back campaign

triggers.name: high_engagement_detected
triggers.action: Fast-track to Early Access, send onboarding/intake form email immediately

triggers.name: patient_reply
triggers.action: Flag for immediate human review, pause automation for this contact

triggers.name: unsubscribe_request
triggers.action: Remove from all sequences immediately, honor request, log for compliance

triggers.name: daily_metrics_review
triggers.description: Review nurture metrics for trending issues
triggers.action: Calculate aggregated open rate, click rate, unsubscribe rate; alert if trending down

integrations.fallback: Queue email sends in local buffer; retry hourly until success
If down, query cached event data; continue with best-known state
If down, queue audience updates locally; retry when available

endpoints: POST /queue/create (create support ticket for patient replies)
integrations.fallback: If down, email support team directly; escalate manually

emails.name: Welcome to ENNIE
subject_variants: Welcome to ENNIE — Healing that actually works
Your journey to chronic pain relief starts here
Meet the healers who can help you feel better

emails.name: How energy healing works for chronic pain
subject_variants: What our patients say about healing (you might be surprised)
The science behind energy healing for pain relief
Real results: how our patients reduced pain

emails.name: Ready to try your first session?
subject_variants: Limited time: first session just $29 (50% off)
Your first healing session is almost ready
Meet your perfect healer — book now

emails.name: Why fast-track members love ENNIE
subject_variants: Exclusive: Join our VIP early access program
The secret to faster pain relief (hint: community matters)
Unlock VIP healer access — special offer inside

emails.name: We miss you — special offer inside
emails.subject: We noticed you might need this... [Special offer]

emails.name: One more thing before we let you go
emails.subject: This might be the most important email we send you

functional: All email opens/clicks tracked correctly (match Loops reporting)
Engagement score calculations accurate (manual spot checks)
Email variants sent to correct segments
High-engagement leads auto-moved to Early Access
Patient replies routed to support immediately

error_handling.policy: Ensure email delivery, graceful degradation, escalate critical issues

error_cases.handling: Mark contact as invalid, remove from all sequences, escalate

error_cases.error: Loops API timeout during contact update
error_cases.handling: Queue update in local buffer, retry with exponential backoff
Monitor sender reputation, adjust send frequency
error_cases.escalation: If open rate drops >20%, alert email team

error_cases.handling: Create support ticket immediately, pause automation for this contact
error_cases.escalation: Route to human support within 15 minutes

error_cases.handling: Honor immediately, remove from all sequences

startup_checklist: Verify all email sequences configured in Loops
Perform dry-run of email send workflow
